en.description: An AI-powered open-source attack platform breached 600+ FortiGate firewalls across 55 countries. An unskilled threat actor leveraged AI to execute attacks at scale. This article analyzes the CyberStrikeAI incident and presents a defense-in-depth framework for CxOs to protect data beyond the firewall.
en.rawFrontmatter:
layout: "Article"
category: "blog"
title: "AI Attack Tools Breach 600 Firewalls Across 55 Countries: How to Protect the Data Beyond the Firewall"
description: "An AI-powered open-source attack platform breached 600+ FortiGate firewalls across 55 countries. An unskilled threat actor leveraged AI to execute attacks at scale. This article analyzes the CyberStrikeAI incident and presents a defense-in-depth framework for CxOs to protect data beyond the firewall."

ja.description: AI攻撃ツールCyberStrikeAIが55カ国のファイアウォール600台を突破。技術的に未熟な攻撃者がAIで大規模攻撃を実行した事件を分析し、ファイアウォールの先にあるデータを守る多層防御フレームワークをCxO向けに解説します。
